fields.helpText: This field contains a list of various Coronary Arteries segments for use by the Catheterization sub-module of the Cardiology module.

fields.setOfCodes: R:RCA;L:LAD;C:CIRC;X:RCA AND LAD;Y:RCA AND CIRC;Z:LAD AND CIRC;
fields.helpText: This field is used as a screen to separate RCA, LAD, and Circumflex segments.
This field is a link to the Laboratory Topography Field file.
